title: polyscias vieillardii subsp. balansae
intro: Polyscias vieillardii subsp. balansae, also known as the Balansa Polyscias, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is a type of shrub or small tree that is native to New Caledonia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of the plant are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat a range of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
